channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US military disables Gambian-flagged ship attempting to breach Iran port blockade
item.description: A United States military operation targeted a merchant vessel flying the Gambian flag after it attempted to breach a blockade of Iranian ports, according to US Central Command. The incident occurred a...

item.title: Balancing Family Expectations and Personal Career Choices
item.description: Clarisa, a 19-year-old medical freshman, shares her struggle of being forced into medical school by her mother, despite knowing she would hate being a doctor. After her father's death, her mother inve...

item.title: Wike urges Rivers State to support Tinubu’s 2027 re-election bid, cites federal benefits and unity
item.description: The Minister of the Federal Capital Territory (FCT), Nyesom Wike, has stated that Rivers State has no option but to continue supporting President Bola Tinubu’s re-election bid ahead of the 2027 genera...

item.title: Health Minister Aaron Motsoaledi responds to Constitutional Court ruling on certificate of need and implications for NHI
item.description: In this Q&A, South Africa’s Minister of Health, Aaron Motsoaledi, responds to questions following the Constitutional Court’s ruling that declared sections of the National Health Act relating to the ce...

item.title: Arsenal Loss in Champions League Final Moves News Anchor to Tears on Live TV
item.description: During the UEFA Champions League final, Etaya TV sports presenter Sarah Ontita broke down live on air while reporting Arsenal's loss to Paris Saint-Germain (PSG). Arsenal initially took the lead throu...

item.title: Omega-3 Fatty Acids May Reduce Insulin Resistance in Non-Obese Type 2 Diabetes
item.description: A recent study from Brazil suggests that omega-3 fatty acids, found in fish oil, may help reduce insulin resistance even in individuals with type 2 diabetes who are not obese. Using Goto-Kakizaki rats...

item.title: Husband struggles with boundaries over wife’s financial support for adult sons
item.description: In this advice column, a man writes to columnist R. Eric Thomas about tension in his relatively new marriage caused by his wife’s ongoing financial and emotional support for her adult sons. The couple...

item.title: Andy Williams: Celebrating the Life of a Legendary Yukon Glacier Pilot
item.description: Andy Williams, a respected glacier pilot in the Yukon, passed away earlier this month, leaving behind a legacy of expertise, humility, and dedication to the northern backcountry. Born in Wales, Willia...

item.title: Johannesburg Faces Fiscal Crisis Due to High Salaries and Underfunded Services
item.description: The City of Johannesburg's 2026/2027 budget of R97.1 billion has sparked concern among experts due to its heavy reliance on salaries, high debt levels, and minimal infrastructure investment. Analysts ...

item.title: Bulls overpower Munster to reach URC semifinals against Glasgow Warriors
item.description: The Bulls delivered a dominant performance at Loftus Versfeld, overpowering Munster 45-14 in their United Rugby Championship (URC) quarterfinal to book a place in the semifinals against Glasgow Warrio...

item.title: Power outage at Dhabeji pumping station worsens Karachi water shortage during Eid
item.description: Karachi is currently facing an increasingly severe water shortage after an emergency power outage disrupted operations at the Dhabeji Pumping Station, one of the key facilities supplying water to the ...

item.title: Company linked to Ekurhuleni contracts funded Imogen Mashazi’s R3.35 million private jet trip to London
item.description: A Sunday Times investigation has identified the company that funded former Ekurhuleni city manager Imogen Mashazi’s private jet trip to London in July 2022. According to documents reviewed by the news...

item.title: PSG defeat Arsenal on penalties to retain UEFA Champions League title
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain have successfully defended their UEFA Champions League crown after edging Arsenal 4-3 on penalties following a 1-1 draw in regulation time at the Puskás Arena. The final was a tigh...

item.title: Is my close friendship with a colleague actually romantic love?
item.description: A reader working at a university describes a growing emotional bond with a male colleague and friend. Over many months, their relationship has developed into a close friendship marked by frequent time...

item.title: Utumishi Girls Academy fire leaves 16 students dead, with several victims yet to be identified
item.description: A tragic fire at Utumishi Girls Academy in Nakuru County has left the country in shock after 16 students lost their lives in a dormitory blaze suspected to be arson. According to preliminary investiga...

item.title: Federal Judge Halts Kennedy Center Renovation Plan as Trump Criticizes Ruling and Legal Challenges
item.description: President Donald Trump publicly criticized a federal judge after a court ruling blocked his proposed renovation and temporary closure of the Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts. U.S. District Judge...

item.title: Charlene Gonzalez and Aga Muhlach mark 25 years of marriage
item.description: Charlene Gonzalez and Aga Muhlach, two well-known figures in Philippine showbiz, are celebrating a major milestone in their personal lives as they mark their silver wedding anniversary. The couple, wh...

item.title: Roberto Martinez says Cristiano Ronaldo could still feature for Portugal at the 2030 World Cup
item.description: Portugal head coach Roberto Martinez has dismissed doubts about Cristiano Ronaldo's ability to remain involved with the national team until the 2030 FIFA World Cup. Speaking on Spanish radio station C...

item.title: APSRTC bus collision with stationary lorry in Gajuwaka leaves three dead and seven injured
item.description: A tragic road accident occurred in the early hours of Sunday at Sri Nagar Junction under Gajuwaka police station limits in Visakhapatnam, where an APSRTC super luxury bus collided with a stationary co...

item.title: Ramachandra Guha on how Congress leadership issues have strengthened Narendra Modi’s political dominance
item.description: In this opinion article, historian Ramachandra Guha critically examines the role of the Gandhi family in the declining fortunes of the Congress party and argues that their leadership style has indirec...
